package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepeatedStringTrimNormalize() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_string_trim_normalize"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "chains like `strings.TrimSpace(strings.ToLower(strings.TrimPrefix(s, ...)))` that scan the string multiple times"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
